payload.actions_taken: ["inspected the second PR 50 failure","identified absolute changeset paths in freshly materialized databases","replayed Bash changesets from the state root","replayed PowerShell changesets from the state root","added relative-path and no-checkout-path regression assertions","ran the complete pre-merge contract"]
payload.harness_friction: Local compaction used a directly mutated database, while fresh CI replayed post-baseline events and exposed that absolute apply paths were being persisted; the materialization regression now checks the stored path and complete dump.
payload.notes: The first hosted rerun proved the JSONL LF fix on Windows. Local focused tests and the complete pre-merge contract pass for relative replay paths; hosted rerun follows after push.
payload.task_summary: Prevented replay paths from leaking checkout directories into compacted snapshots
